summary: Complete testing of Route Planner feature. Backend: 10/10 pytest tests passed for /api/routes/locations and /api/routes/calculate endpoints. Frontend: All Route Planner features verified working including star map, ship selector, origin/destination dropdowns, route calculation, cross-system routing, waypoints display, and QD size buttons.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/routes/locations returns 61 locations across 3 systems (Stanton, Pyro, Nyx) - PASSED
Backend: All locations have required fields (id, name, system, type, map_x, map_y) - PASSED
Backend: Locations grouped by system (Stanton 40+, Pyro 8+, Nyx 8+) - PASSED
Backend: Same-system route calculation (Hurston → microTech) - PASSED
Backend: Cross-system route calculation (Hurston → Pyro III via gateway) - PASSED
Backend: QD size affects travel time (S1 > S2 > S3) - PASSED
Backend: Error handling for same origin/destination - PASSED
Backend: Error handling for invalid location - PASSED
Backend: All location types present (star, planet, moon, station, gateway) - PASSED
Backend: Cross-system Nyx route (Hurston → Delamar) - PASSED
Frontend: Route Planner page (/routes) loads correctly - PASSED
Frontend: Star map shows all 3 systems (Stanton, Pyro, Nyx) - PASSED
Frontend: Ship selector shows 276 quantum-capable ships with QD size info - PASSED
Frontend: Origin/Destination dropdowns grouped by system (Stanton, Pyro, Nyx) - PASSED
Frontend: Same-system route shows distance (53.16 Mkm), travel time (5m 30s), waypoints - PASSED
Frontend: Cross-system route shows Cross-System badge, 3 waypoints with Jump Tunnel - PASSED
Frontend: Route visualization on map (cyan for quantum, orange dashed for jump) - PASSED
Frontend: Swap button swaps origin and destination - PASSED
Frontend: QD Size buttons (S1, S2, S3) change travel time calculation - PASSED
Frontend: System filter buttons (ALL, STANTON, PYRO, NYX) present - PASSED
Frontend: Routes nav link appears in navigation bar - PASSED
Frontend: Dashboard shows fleet ships with components/weapons info - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Route Planner correctly implements quantum travel across 3 star systems with jump points
Star map uses canvas-based 2D rendering with pan/zoom support
Ship selector properly filters quantum-capable ships and shows QD size
Cross-system routes correctly calculate gateway hops and jump tunnel distances
QD speed data matches game mechanics (S1: 165k, S2: 190k, S3: 240k km/s)
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - route planner uses static star_systems.py data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Route Planner feature fully tested and working. The /api/routes/locations endpoint returns 61 locations across Stanton (40+), Pyro (10+), and Nyx (8+) systems. Cross-system routes go through gateway jump points (e.g., Stanton-Pyro Gateway). The frontend star map is canvas-based with interactive features (pan, zoom, click to select locations). Ship selector filters to quantum-capable ships only.

feature_verification_summary.route_planner_page: PASS - /routes page loads with star map and controls
feature_verification_summary.star_map_systems: PASS - Shows all 3 systems (Stanton, Pyro, Nyx) with locations
feature_verification_summary.ship_selector: PASS - 276 ships with QD size info (e.g., 'Avenger Titan (QD S1)')
feature_verification_summary.origin_dest_dropdowns: PASS - Locations grouped by system in optgroups
feature_verification_summary.same_system_route: PASS - Hurston → microTech shows 53.16 Mkm, 5m 30s, 1 waypoint
feature_verification_summary.cross_system_route: PASS - Hurston → Pyro III shows 244.51 Mkm, 21m+ with Cross-System badge and 3 waypoints (quantum → jump tunnel → quantum)
feature_verification_summary.route_visualization: PASS - Cyan lines for quantum, orange dashed for jump tunnels
feature_verification_summary.swap_button: PASS - Correctly swaps origin and destination
feature_verification_summary.qd_size_buttons: PASS - S1/S2/S3 buttons update travel time calculation
feature_verification_summary.routes_nav: PASS - Routes nav item with Navigation icon in header
feature_verification_summary.dashboard_components: PASS - Dashboard shows fleet ships with hardpoint info (shields, power, cooler, quantum, weapons)

route_api_response_samples.locations_endpoint: 61 locations with id, name, system, type, map_x, map_y, distance_from_star
